---
title : "Optimal score functions"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: zephyr
engine: julia
---

## Optimal score functions for Gaussian class-conditional densities in one dimension.
```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("..")
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
colors = Makie.wong_colors()
blue, orange, green, red = colors[1], colors[2], colors[3], colors[6]
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
gaussian_pdf(x, μ, σ) = 1/(sqrt(2π) * σ) .* exp.(-((x .- μ).^2) ./ (2σ^2))
```
```{julia}
#| output : false
function plot_binary_classification_scores()
    x = -5:0.01:5

    # Class-conditional densities
    μ1, σ1 = 2.0, 1.0
    μ2, σ2 = -2.0, 1.0

    pdf1 = gaussian_pdf(x, μ1, σ1)
    pdf2 = gaussian_pdf(x, μ2, σ2)  
    η = pdf1 ./ (pdf1 .+ pdf2) # Posterior probability

    fig = Figure(size=(800, 400))

    ax1 = Axis(
        fig[1, 1],
        title = "Class-conditional densities",
        limits = (-5, 5, 0, 0.41)
    )

    lines!(ax1, x, pdf1, label="Class 1")
    lines!(ax1, x, pdf2, label="Class -1")
    axislegend(ax1)

    ax2 = Axis(
        fig[1, 2],
        title = "Optimal scores",
        limits = (-5, 5, -3, 3)
    )

    score = 2 .* η .- 1

    lines!(ax2, x, score, label=L"2 \eta (x) - 1")
    lines!(ax2, x, sign.(score), label = L"\text{sign} (2 \eta (x) - 1)")
    lines!(ax2, x, 2*atanh.(score), label = L"2 \text{atanh} (2\eta (x) - 1)")
    axislegend(ax2, position = :lt)

    fig
end
```

```{julia}
plot_binary_classification_scores()
```
